patch.value:
GitHub: https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/474

Honor `--limit` in hybrid search mode (parity with keyword mode), applied after hybrid rank fusion so the top-N fused results are returned. Preserve the deterministic limit=0 empty-result semantics established in pm-6mn1.
GH-474: pm search --limit support in hybrid mode

Dogfood GH-474: hybrid search can return many results and --limit (available in keyword mode) is not honored/available in hybrid mode, breaking agent token budgets. Duplicate check: searched hybrid search limit — pm-6mn1 (closed, M4) covered limit=0 determinism only; this is general --limit support in hybrid mode.

pm search --mode hybrid honors --limit identically to keyword mode (applied after fusion ranking); documented in help/contracts; spec covers limit interaction with hybrid result fusion including limit=0 determinism from pm-6mn1
